title: RESET
text: RESET A predefined value for the properties of UX widgets, which is an instance of empty object, and is shown as an empty object {} in JavaScript debugger. uniface.RESET Description It is used as a constant value. It is read-only value and cannot be changed. It can be compared by strict equality (triple equals) "===", for example: Explain this code if (value === uniface.RESET) { //... } Copy It appears as a property value in the data argument of dataUpdate API method of UX widgets. For more details, see Predefined property value: uniface.RESET section in dataUpdate . Related Links dataUpdate Updates a widget's state when the data object's data is changed. uniface The uniface object enables you to obtain information about DSP instances. Was this topic helpful?
